theory.intro: Metres and kilometres are linked by place value: there are $1000$ metres in one kilometre. Decimals make converting between them quick.
facts: To change **m to km**, divide by $1000$ (move the point $3$ places left).
To change **km to m**, multiply by $1000$ (move the point $3$ places right).
steps: Decide which way you are converting.
Multiply by $1000$ (km $\to$ m) or divide by $1000$ (m $\to$ km).
Move the decimal point three places in the matching direction.
